notes: SPDX is a Linux Foundation project. The project domain is spdx.dev. SPDX is also an ISO standard (ISO/IEC 5962:2021) for SPDX 2.2.1. The Linux Foundation governs the working group; the spec is developed in the open at github.com/spdx/spdx-spec.

data.description: Open standard for communicating SBOM information, including provenance, license, security, and other related information. Provides a common format for describing the components, licenses, and copyrights associated with software packages.
data.notes: Two related ID systems live within SPDX: (1) SPDX identifiers for software packages and files within an SBOM document, and (2) SPDX license identifiers (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0-only) which are widely used outside SBOM contexts. The SPDX License List is the canonical license-identifier registry referenced by many tools. SPDX 2.3 is current; SPDX 3.0 is in development. A data format; placed under reference.

urls.note: SPDX License List — canonical license-identifier registry
